item.name: Bulk IOC Lookup and Create Intel

query.description: [Boolean] Pass true to retrieve the last enriched details of the IOCs. Default: false
[Boolean] Pass true to create an intel for the valid IOCs that are not available on the platform. Default: false

request.description:
Perform a lookup for IOCs to retrieve the list of objects available in the CTIX platform. If some IOCs are not available in the platform, you can choose to create intel and ingest the missing IOCs. You can lookup and ingest a maximum of 1000 IOCs in an API request. You can perform a lookup for the following IOC types: - IPv4 - IPv6 - Email Address - MD5 - SHA1 - SHA256 - SHA512 - SSDEEP - URL - Domain #### **Request Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | ioc_values | Array | Mandatory | Pass a list of up to 1000 IOC values to lookup. | | source | String | Optional | Pass the name of the source to map the intel.
If the passed source name does not exists in the platform, then a new source is automatically created with the suffix `(OpenAPI)` in the `Miscellaneous` source category.
Default source: `OpenAPI Lookup (OpenAPI)` of the `Miscellaneous` source category. | | collection | String | Optional | Pass the name of the source collection to associate with the source.
If the passed collection name does not exists in the platform, then a new collection is automatically created with the suffix `(OpenAPI)`.
Default collection: `OpenAPI Lookup (OpenAPI)`. | | metadata | JSON Object | Optional | Pass additional information to associate with the intel. | | metadata.description | String | Optional | Pass a description for the intel. | | metadata.confidence | Integer | Optional | Pass the Source Confidence Score to associate with the intel.
Default value: null | | metadata.tlp | String | Optional | Pass the TLP to associate with the intel.
Allowed values:
`GREEN`
`AMBER`
`RED`
`WHITE`
`NONE`
Default value: null | | metadata.labels | Array | Optional | Pass a list of tag names to associate with the intel.
By default, the `created_using_openapi_lookup` tag is added to all created objects. | #### **Response Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | found_iocs | JSON Object | Returns the details of the IOCs that exist in the platform. | | found_iocs.results | Array | Returns a list of JSON objects. Each object includes the details of the IOCs that exists in the platform. For more information, see _The Results Objects_. | | found_iocs.total | Integer | Returns the details of the IOCs that exist in the platform. | | values_not_found | JSON Object | Returns the details of the IOCs that do not exist in the platform. | | values_not_found.invalid_values | Array | Returns a list of invalid IOC values. Invalid IOC values will not be ingested into the platform. | | values_not_found.total_invalid | Integer | Returns the total count of invalid IOC values. | | values_not_found.valid_iocs | Array | Returns a list of all valid IOC values. All valid IOC values will be ingested into the platform if the query parameter `create=true` is passed with the request. | | values_not_found.total_valid | Integer | Returns the total number of valid IOC values. | #### **The Results Objects** Each object in the `results` array of the response includes the following parameters: | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | analyst_cvss_score | Integer | Returns the CVSS score assigned to a vulnerability object by an analyst. | | analyst_score | String | Returns the Confidence Score assigned to the IOC by an analyst. | | analyst_tlp | String | Returns the TLP assigned to the IOC by an analyst. | | confidence_score | Integer | Returns the Confidence Score calculated by the CTIX confidence score engine. | | confidence_type | String | Returns the type of Confidence Score.
`ctix`: Confidence Score is calculated in CTIX.
`third-party`: Confidence Score is calculated by a third-party application. | | country | String | Returns the name of the country where the IOC was seen. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the source created date and time of the IOC. | | ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the created date and time of the IOC in CTIX. | | ctix_modified | Timestamp | Returns the modified date and time of the IOC. | | description | String | Returns the description of the IOC received from the source. | | first_seen | Timestamp | Returns the date and time when the IOC was first seen. | | id | String | Returns the unique ID assigned by CTIX to the IOC. | | inidicator_type | String | Returns the type of an indicator.
Returns `null` if the threat data object is not an indicator.
Returns `file` for hashes and the indicator type key for other indicators. | | ioc_type | String | Returns the IOC type.
Returns `null` if the threat data object is not an indicator.
Returns hash type for hashes and the indicator type key for other indicators. | | is_actioned | Boolean | Returns `true` if an action was performed on the threat data object in CTIX. Else, returns `false`. | | is_deprecated | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is marked as deprecated in CTIX. Else, returns `false`. | | is_false_positive | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is marked as false positive in CTIX. Else, returns `false`. | | is_reviewed | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is reviewed. Else, returns `false`. | | is_revoked | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is revoked. Else, returns `false`. | | is_under_review | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is marked for manual review. Else, returns `false`. | | is_watchlist | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is added to the watchlist. Else, returns `false`. | | is_whitelisted | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is marked as an allowed indicator. Else, returns `false`. | | last seen | Timestamp | Returns the last seen date and time of the IOC. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the source modified date and time of the IOC. | | name | String | Returns the value of the IOC. | | primary_attribute | String | Returns the primary attribute of the threat data object if the IOC is a custom object. | | published_collections | Array | Returns a list of JSON objects for the collections in which the IOC is published. | | risk_severity | String | Returns the risk severity of the IOC. For example, UNKNOWN, TRIVIAL, MINOR, MODERATE, MAJOR, and CRITICAL. | | severity | String | Returns the severity level of the IOC. | | source_collections | Array | Returns the list of IDs and names of source collections of the IOC. | | source_confidence | String | Returns the confidence score of the IOC as reported by the source. | | sources | Array | Returns the list of sources that reported the IOC. | | sub_type | String | Returns the sub-type of an indicator.
Returns `null` if the threat data object is not an indicator.
Returns hash type for hashes and `value` for other indicators. | | subscriber_collections | Array | Returns the collections in which the IOC is published and subscribers are polling data from the collections. | | subscribers | Array | Returns the subscribers that are polling the IOC from published collections. | | tags | Array | Returns the tags associated with the IOC. | | tlp | String | Returns the TLP assigned to the IOC by the source. | | type | String | Returns the SDO type of the threat data object. Returns `indicator` for IOCs. | | valid_from | Timestamp | Returns the date and time since when this IOC is valid. | | valid_until | Timestamp | Returns the date and time until when this IOC is valid. | | enrichments | JSON Object | Returns the last enrichment details of the IOC. |

query.description: When marked true, adds last enriched info for each enriched object
When marked true, create new IOCs that were missed from the list of lookup IOCs.

query.description: [Boolean] Pass true to retrieve the latest five enrichment data objects. Default: false
[Boolean] Pass true to retrieve the latest 100 relations details. Default: false

[String] Pass the name of up to five enrichment tools separated by a comma. To retrieve a list of enrichment tools, use the GET Enrichment Tools API under Administration > Enrichment Management > Enrichment Tools.
[String] Pass a comma-separated list of field names to retrieve specific details of the objects. By default, all fields are retrieved.

variable.description: Pass an object type to lookup. For the list of supported object types, see Supported SDO Types in Threat Data > Miscellaneous.

request.description:
Performs a lookup for threat data objects in the CTIX platform and retrieves the details of the objects, such as basic details, enriched data, and relations. #### **Request Parameters** **Note**: Pass one of the following parameters. | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | value | Array | Optional | Pass a list of up to 100 threat data object values to look up. | | object_id | Array | Optional | Pass a list of up to 100 threat data object IDs to look up. | #### **Response Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | analyst_score | String | Returns the score assigned to the threat data object by an analyst. | | analyst_tlp | String | Returns the TLP assigned to the threat data object by an analyst. | | country | String | Returns the country name where the threat data object was seen. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the source created date and time of the threat data object. | | ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the created date and time of the threat data object in CTIX. | | ctix_modified | Timestamp | Returns the last modified date and time of the threat data object in CTIX. | | custom_attributes | Array | Returns a list of custom attributes with details, such as `custom_attribute_name`, `custom_attribute_value`, `custom_attribute_value_integer`, and `custom_attribute_value_float`.
Examples: Custom Attribute Name:`criticality`
Custom Attribute Value: `2` | | confidence_score | Integer | Returns the Confidence Score calculated by the CTIX confidence score engine. | | description | String | Returns the source description of the threat data. | | enrichment_data | Array | Returns a list of enrichment objects retrieved from the enrichment tools. | | first_seen | Timestamp | Returns the first seen date and time of the threat data object. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the threat data object. | | ioc_type | String | Returns the IOC type.
Returns `null` if the threat data object is not an indicator.
Returns hash type for hashes and the indicator type key for other indicators. | | is_deprecated | Returns `true` if the IOC is marked as deprecated in CTIX. Else, returns `false`. | | | is_false_positive | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is marked as false positive in CTIX. Else, returns `false`. | | is_reviewed | Boolean | Returns `true` if the threat data object is manually reviewed. Else, returns `false`. | | is_whitelisted | Boolean | Returns `true` if the IOC is marked as an allowed indicator. Else, returns `false`. | | last seen | Timestamp | Returns the last seen date and time of the threat data object. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the source modified date and time of the threat data object. | | name | String | Returns the value of the threat data object. | | object_type | String | Returns the SDO type the threat data object type of the IOC. | | published_collections | Array | Returns a list of JSON objects for the collections in which the IOC is published. | | relations | JSON Object | Returns a list of related threat data objects. | | sources | Array | Returns the list of sources that reported the threat data object. | | sub_type | String | Returns the sub-type of an indicator.
Returns `null` if the threat data object is not an indicator.
Returns hash type for hashes and `value` for other indicators. | | tags | Array | Returns the tags associated with the threat data object. | | tlp | String | Returns the TLP assigned to the threat data object by the source. | | manual_review | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data is marked for manual review by an analyst. | | valid_from | Timestamp | Returns the date and time since when this threat data object is valid. | | valid_until | Timestamp | Returns the date and time until when this threat data object is valid. |

item.description: Intel received in CTIX from different sources is categorized into various STIX object types, normalized, and deduplicated for further analysis. Threat Data module displays all the ingested objects for analysis and actioning.

item.name: Threat Data Objects
Basic Details

variable.description: Pass the type of the object such as indicator, vulnerability, malware, and more.
Pass the ID of the object to retrieve the details.

request.description:
Returns basic correlated details of a threat data object in CTIX.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| analyst_description | String | Returns the description given by an analyst. |
| analyst_score | Integer | Returns the score given by an analyst. |
| analyst_tlp | String | Returns the TLP value given by an analyst. |
| base_type | Sring | Returns if the object was part of any SDO or has been observed. |
| confidence_score | Integer | Returns the confidence score of the object. |
| confidence_type | String | Returns the type of confidence score engine used to calculate the score. |
| country | String | Returns the country for a valid object. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the STIX defined creation date in EPOCH format of the object. |
| ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the creation date in EPOCH format of the object in the CTIX platform . |
| ctix_modified | Timestamp | Returns the modification date in EPOCH format of the object in the CTIX platform. |
| ctix_score | Integer | Returns the score of an object in the CTIX platform. |
| ctix_tlp | String | Returns the TLP of the object in the CTIX platform. |
| defang_analyst_description | String | Returns the defanged description. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the object. |
| fang_analyst_description | String | Returns the fanged description of the object. |
| first_seen | Timestamp | Returns the STIX defined date in EPOCH format on which the object was first observed. |
| last_seen | Timestamp | Returns the STIX defined date in EPOCH format on which the object was last observed. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the STIX defined date in EPOCH format on which the object was modified. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the object. |
| sources | Array | Returns the list of sources from where the object has been received. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the source. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the source. |
| source_type | String | Returns the type of sources such as API Feed, RSS Feed, and more. |
| sub_type | String | Returns the valid subtype of the object such as an indicator is a valid subtype is a URL, domain, and more. |
| tld | String | Returns the Top Level Domain(TLD) value for Domain objects. |
| tlp | String | Returns the TLP of the object. |
| type | String | Returns the type of object. |
| types | Array | Returns the types of objects referred to by STIX as indicator types, malware types, and more. |
| valid_from | Timestamp | Returns the STIX defined as valid in EPOCH format from the date of an object. |
| valid_until | Timestamp | Returns the STIX defined as valid in EPOCH format until the date of an object. |

request.description:
Retrieves additional information of a threat data object, such as, kill chain phases and published collections.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| kill_chain_phases | Array | Returns a list of kill chain phases with the phase ID, kill chain name, and phase name. |
| published_collections | Array | Returns a list of published collections with the ID, action type, name, and published time. |

request.description:
Retrieves the source object information for the given threat data object ID.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the record. |
| collection | JSON Object | Returns the details about the collection. |
| confidence | Integer | Returns the confidence score reported from a source. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the object creation as received from the source over a platform. |
| ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of object creation over the platform. |
| ctix_modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of object modification over the platform. |
| custom_attributes | Array | Returns the list of custom attributes received for the object from the source. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the object given by the source. |
| granular_markings | String | Returns the granular markings sent from the source as defined from STIX. |
| kill_chain_phases | Array | Returns the list of kill chain phases for the valid objects. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the modified date and time as received from the source. |
| pattern | String | Returns the pattern as received from the source in case of a valid object, such as an indicator. |
| pattern_type | String | Returns the pattern type as received from the source in case of a valid object, such as an indicator. |
| pattern_version | String | Returns the pattern version as received from the source in case of the valid object, such as an indicator. |
| received_id | String | Returns the ID of the object received from the source. |
| sco_object_id | String | Returns the ID of the object as stored in the database. |
| source | String | Returns details about the source. |
| spec_version | String | Returns the specific version of TAXII as received from the source in case of a valid object. |
| tags | Array | Returns the list of tags received from the source. |
| types | Array | Returns the list of valid types for the object received from the source. |
| unique_hash | String | Returns the hash value used for recognizing a record in CTIX. |
| valid_from | Timestamp | Returns the date and time from which the received object is valid over the platform. |
| valid_until | Timestamp | Returns the date and time till which the received object is valid over the platform. |

0: Not Enriched
1: Successfully Enriched
2: Failed to Enrich
3: Quota completed | | verdict | String | Returns whether the selected data is malicious or not. | | enriched_on | Timestamp | Returns the date and time in EPOCH format when threat data was enriched. | | timestamp | Timestamp | Returns the date and time in EPOCH format when the threat data was enriched. |

request.description:
Retrieves a list of actions performed on a threat data object.

#### **Request Parameters**

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### **Response Parameters**

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the URL link to the next page. |
| prev | String | Returns the URL link of the previous page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the page size of the requested page. |
| results | Array | Returns the list of actions. |
| id | String | Returns the action ID. |
| actioned_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the user who performed the action. |
| actioned_on | Timestamp | Returns the action date and time in EPOCh format. |
| action_name | String | Returns the name of the action performed. |
| rule_name | String | Returns the name of the applied rule. |
| app_type | String | Returns the type of application used to perform the action, such as CTIX or third-party application. |
| app_name | String | Returns the name of the application, such as Pfense, QRadar, and more. |
| app_response | JSON Object | Returns the response as received from the application. |
| object_id | String | Returns the ID of the threat data object. |
| object_type | String | Returns the object type of the threat data. |

List Tasks in Threat Data Object

query.description: [Integer] Pass the page number to retrieve tasks.
[Integer] Pass the number of records to retrieve per page.
[String] Pass the priority to filter tasks.
[String] Pass the status to filter tasks.
[String] Pass the ID of a user to filter tasks by the assigned user.
[Timestamp] Pass the start date of the task deadline in EPOCH format to filter tasks.

request.description:
Returns the list of tasks associated with a threat data object.

#### **Request Parameters**

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### **Response Parameters**

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the pagination link to the next page. |
| previous | String | Returns the pagination link to the previous page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of elements that can be present on a page. |
| results | JSON Object | Returns the list of tasks. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the task. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the date in EPOCH format of creation of the task. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the date in EPOCH format the task was modified. |
| created_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the user who created the task. |
| assignee | JSON Object | Returns the details of the assigned user of the task. |
| text | String | Returns the text or description of the task. |
| priority | String | Returns the priority of the task. |
| status | String | Returns the status of the task. Status can be in Progress, not started, or completed. |
| deadline | Integer | Returns the deadline of the task. |
| closure comment | String | Returns any comments that are added while marking the task as complete. |
| completed_on | Timestamp | Returns the date in EPOCH format of completion of the task. |
| type | String | Returns the type of threat data object that is associated with the task. |
| object ID | String | Returns the Threat data object ID associated with the task. |

Returns the details of a task.

#### **Response Parameters**

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the task. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the date of creation of the task in EPOCH format. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the date the task was modified in EPOCH format. |
| created_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the user who created the task. |
| assignee | JSON Object | Returns the details of the assigned user of the task. |
| text | String | Returns the text or description of the task. |
| priority | String | Returns the priority of the task. |
| status | String | Returns the status of the task. Status can be in Progress, not started, or completed. |
| deadline | Integer | Returns the deadline of the task. |
| closure comment | String | Returns any comments that are added while marking the task as complete. |
| completed_on | Timestamp | Returns the date of completion of the task in EPOCH format. |
| type | String | Returns the type of threat data object that is associated with the task. |
| object ID | String | Returns the Threat data object ID associated with the task. |

item.name: Create Task in Threat Data Object

request.description:
Creates a task for a threat data object. #### **Request Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | assignee | String | Required | Pass the ID of a user to assign the task. | | text | String | Required | Pass the description of the task to be performed. | | priority | String | Optional | Pass the priority of the task.
Allowed values:
`high`
`medium`
`low`
Default: `Medium` | | status | String | Optional | Pass the status of the task.
Allowed values:
`not_started`
`in_progress`
`completed`Default: `not_started` | | closure_comment | String | Optional (Required if the status is `completed`) | Pass the comment to close the task. | | deadline | Integer | Optional | Pass the deadline of the task. | | type | String | Optional | Pass the type of the threat data object. For example, indicator, malware, vulnerability, campaign, and more. | | object id | String | Optional | Pass the ID of the threat data object to associate the task. Else, the task is created as a global task. | #### **Response Parameters** | **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | id | String | Returns the ID of the task. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the date of creation of the task in EPOCH format. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the date the task was modified. | | created_by | JSON Object | Returns the user who created the task. | | assignee | JSON Object | Returns the assignee of the task. | | text | String | Returns the text or description of the task. | | priority | String | Returns the priority of the task. | | status | String | Returns the status of the task. Status can be in Progress, not started, or completed. | | deadline | Integer | Returns the deadline of the task. | | closure_comment | String | Returns any comments that are added while marking the task as complete. | | completed_on | Timestamp | Returns the date of completion of the task in EPOCH format. | | type | String | Returns the type of threat data object that is associated with the task. | | object_id | String | Returns the object id associated with the task. |

request.description:
Creates a task in multiple threat data objects. #### Request Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | object_type | String | Required | Pass the type of the threat data object such as indicator, malware, vulnerability, and more. | | object_ids | Array | Required | Pass a list of threat data object IDs to associate the task. | | data | JSON Object | Required | Pass the data associated with the task. | | data: assignee | String | Required | Pass the ID of a user to assign the task. | | data: text | String | Required | Pass the description of the task to be performed. | | data: priority | String | Optional | Pass the priority of the task.
Allowed values:
`high`
`medium`
`low`
Default: `Medium` | | data: status | String | Optional | Pass the status of the task.
Allowed values:
`not_started`
`in_progress`
`completed`Default: `not_started` | | data: closure_comment | String | Optional
(Required if the status is `completed`) | Pass the comment to close the task. | | data: deadline | Integer | Optional | Pass the deadline of the task. | | data: type | String | Optional | Pass the type of the threat data object. For example, indicator, malware, vulnerability, campaign, and more. | #### Response Parameters Status code 200: Action Successfully Executed

item.description: Tasks are the actions taken by analysts to respond to threats for containment, proactive prevention, or remediation. You can create tasks in the individual modules, individual threat data elements, and in the global task module as well.

request.description:

Returns null in case it is the last page. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the number of notes displayed per page. | | previous | String | Returns the link to the previous page. Returns null in case it is the first page. | | results | Array | Returns the information, such as created date and time, user details, note ID, and more. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time when the notes were created in EPOCH format. | | created_by | JSON Object | Returns the information of the user who created the notes. The information includes
the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. | | id | String | Returns the unique ID of the notes. | | meta_data | JSON Object | Returns any metadata saved with the notes. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the modification of notes in EPOCH format. | | modified_by | JSON Object | Returns the information of the user who modified the notes. The information includes
the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. | | object_id | String | Returns the UUID of the threat data object associated with the notes. | | text | String | Returns the description associated with notes. | | type | String | Returns the type which is saved for note. |

request.description:
Retrieves the status of the quick actions performed on a threat data object.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ctix_created | Timestamp | Returns the created date and time of the threat data object in EPOCH format. |
| is_deprecated | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data object is deprecated, else returns false. |
| is_false_positive | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data object is marked false positive, else returns false. |
| is_reviewed | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data object is reviewed, else returns false. |
| is_revoked | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data object is revoked, else returns false. |
| is_under_review | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data object is under review, else returns false. |
| is_watchlist | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data object is marked as a watchlist keyword, else returns false. |
| is_whitelisted | Boolean | Returns true if the threat data object is added to the allowed indicator list, else returns false. |
| name | String | Returns the name of the threat data object. |
| notes | Array | Returns the list of notes added to the object. |
| sub_type | String | Returns the sub-type of the threat data object. |
| tags | Array | Returns the list of tags attached to the threat data object. |
| type | String | Returns the type of threat data object. |

item.description: CTIX offers to perform various quick actions, such as deprecating, marking false-positive, reviewing, revoking, and more on a threat data element. This module contains APIs related to quick actions.

CTIX segregates the different formats of threat intel received into STIX Objects such as Indicators, Vulnerabilities, TTPs, Malware, Campaign, Threat Actor, Intrusion Set, Attack Pattern, Incident, Course of Action, Identity, Kill Chain, Kill Chain Phases, and Tool.

item.name: Threat Mailbox

query.description: Pass the ID of the email feed source to retrieve emails from a specific source. By default, emails from all email sources are retrieved. To retrieve the email source ID, use the GET Email Source List API under Administration > Integration management > Email Feed Sources.
Pass true to retrieve read emails only. By default both read and unread emails are retrieved.
Pass true to retrieve starred emails only. By default both starred and non-starred emails are retrieved.
Pass true to retrieve regulatory emails only. By default both regulatory and non-regulatory emails are retrieved.
Pass true to retrieve trashed emails only. By default, trashed emails are not returned.
Pass the query text to search in the subject and body of emails.
Pass the number of emails to retrieve per page. Default: 10
Pass the page number to retrieve emails. Default: 1
Pass true to retrieve emails with attachments.
Pass true to retrieve reviewed emails only. By default both reviewed and not reviewed emails are retrieved.

request.description:
Retrieve a list of email messages received from email feed sources. #### Request Parameters This API endpoint does not require any request parameter. #### Response Parameters: | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns a link to the next page. | | previous | String | Returns a link to the previous page. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the limit of the page. | | total | Integer | Returns the total number of email messages. | | id | String | Returns the unique ID of an email message. | | email_config | String | Returns the unique ID of an email feed source. | | to | String | Returns the username of the receiver. | | to_email | String | Returns the email address of the receiver. | | _from | String | Returns the username of the sender. | | _from_email | String | Returns the email address of the sender. | | subject | String | Returns the subject of the email message. | | date | Timestamp | Returns the date and time in EPOCH format when the email is received. | | is_read | Boolean | Returns true if the email is read, else returns false. | | is_starred | Boolean | Returns true if the email message is bookmarked, else returns false. | | is_delete | Boolean | Returns true if the email message is trashed, else returns false. | | stix_created | Boolean | Returns true if intel is created from this email message, else returns false. | | tenant_id | String | Returns the unique ID of the CTIX instance. | | raw_body | String | Returns the body of the email message. | | is_regulatory_email | Boolean | Returns true if the email is marked as a regulatory email, else returns false. | | folder_id | Integer | Returns the unique ID of the email folder. | | folder_name | String | Returns the name of the email folder. | | has_attachments | Boolean | Returns true if the email message includes attachments, else returns false. | | is_reviewed | JSON | If an email message is marked as reviewed, then it returns the review details of an email message.
Else, this parameter is not returned. | | created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time in EPOCH format when the email is created in CTIX. |

variable.description: Pass the unique ID of an email.

request.description:
Retrieve the number of IOCs in the email body and email attachments.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| email.total | Integer | Returns the count of IOCs in the email body. |
| attachments.id | String | Returns the Unique ID of the attachment. |
| attachments.name | String | Returns the name of the attachment. |
| attachments.total | Integer | Returns the count of IOCs in the attachment. |

query.description: Entity type (value will be 'email_accounts_attachment' or 'email_accounts')

request.description:
Retrieve a list of IOCs and attachments in an email.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameter.

#### Response Parameters:

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| result | Array | Returns the list of IOCs. |
| result.ioc_type | Array | Returns the list of IOC types. |
| result.ioc_type.is_previously_created | Bool | Returns true if intel is already created for this IOC, else returns false. |
| result.ioc_type.value | String | Returns the IOC type value. |

variable.description: Pass the unique ID of an email

request.description:
Creates intel from Threat Mailbox emails in CTIX.

#### Request Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| source_type | String | Mandatory | Pass the email accounts from which the intel is received. |
| content | Array | Mandatory | Pass the IOCs selected from the email content. |
| attached_content | Array | Mandatory | Pass the IOCs selected from email attachments. |
| content_all | Bool | Mandatory | Pass true to include all IOCs from email content, else pass false. |
| content.ioc_type.all | Bool | Mandatory | Pass true to include all IOC types from email content, else pass false. |
| content.ioc_type.values | List | Mandatory | Pass the list of IOCs. |
| content.ioc_type.negation | Bool | Mandatory | Pass true to include only particular IOC types from the email content, else pass false. |
| attached_content.attachment_id.all | Bool | Mandatory | Pass true to include all IOCs of attachments in the intel, else pass false. |
| attached_content.attachment_id.ioc_type.all | Bool | Mandatory | Pass true to include all IOCs of a particular IOC type from attachment in intel, else pass false. |
| attached_content.attachment_id.ioc_type.values | List | Mandatory | Pass the list of IOCs. |
| attached_content.attachment_id.ioc_type.negation | Bool | Mandatory | Pass true to include all IOCs of a particular type except for the IOCs coming in values in intel, else pass false. |

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| details | String | Returns the success or failure message. |

response.name: Create Intel API

item.description: CTIX offers Threat Mailbox to receive threat intel feeds from multiple email accounts. CTIX fetches intel from the attachments, email content, and password protected attachments.

item.name: Threat Bulletin

request.description:
Creates a threat bulletin.

#### **Request Parameter**

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| title | String | Mandatory | Pass the title for the threat bulletin. |
| description | String | Optional | Pass the description for the threat bulletin. |
| status | String | Optional | Pass the status of the creation of the threat bulletin. |
| tlp | String | Optional | Pass the TLP for the threat bulletin. |
| server_collections | List | Optional | Pass the list of server collections. |
| id | String | Optional | Pass the collection ID. |
| name | String | Optional | Pass the collection name. |
| tags | List | Optional | Pass the list of tags. |
| colour_code | String | Optional | Pass the color code. |
| created | Integer | Optional | Pass the time of the creation of the threat bulletin. |
| modified_by | String | Optional | Pass the user who modified the threat bulletin. |
| name | String | Optional | Pass the tag name. |
| modified | Integer | Optional | Pass the time of modification of threat bulletin. |
| id | String | Optional | Pass the tag ID. |
| created_by | String | Optional | Pass the user who created the threat bulletin. |
| attachments | List | Optional | Pass the list of attachments. |
| data | String | Optional | Pass the data for the attachment. |
| mime_type | String | Optional | Pass the attachment type. |
| size | String | Optional | Pass the attachment size. |
| name | String | Optional | Pass the attachment name. |

#### **Response Parameter**

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| status | String | Returns the status of creation. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the threat bulletin. |
| published | Bool | Returns True to indicate the threat bulletin is published, else returns False. |

request.description:
Updates the threat bulletin.

#### **Request Parameters**

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| title | String | Mandatory | Pass the title for the threat bulletin. |
| description | String | Optional | Pass the description for the threat bulletin. |
| status | String | Optional | Pass the status of creation. |
| tlp | String | Optional | Pass the TLP for the threat bulletin. |
| server_collections | List | Optional | Pass the list of server collections. |
| id | String | Optional | Pass the collection ID. |
| name | String | Optional | Pass the collection name. |
| tags | List | Optional | Pass the list of tags. |
| colour_code | String | Optional | Pass the color code. |
| created | Integer | Optional | Pass the time of creation. |
| modified_by | String | Optional | Pass the user who modified the threat bulletin. |
| name | String | Optional | Pass the tag name. |
| modified | Integer | Optional | Pass the time of modification of threat bulletin. |
| id | String | Optional | Pass the tag ID. |
| created_by | String | Optional | Pass the user who created the threat bulletin. |
| attachments | List | Optional | Pass the list of attachments. |
| data | String | Optional | Pass the data for the attachment. |
| mime_type | String | Optional | Pass the attachment type. |
| size | String | Optional | Pass the attachment size. |
| name | String | Optional | Pass the attachment name. |

#### **Response Parameters**

| **Parameters** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |

request.description:
Retrieves a list of articles from RSS feed sources. #### Request Parameters This API endpoint does not require any input parameter. #### **Response Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the link for the next page. | | previous | String | Returns the link for the previous page. | | total | Integer | Returns the total number of RSS feed sources. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the number of elements present on a page. | | results | Array | Returns the list of all RSS feed articles. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the article. | | title | String | Returns the title of the article. | | summary | String | Returns the summary of the article. | | published | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of publishing of the article. | | url | String | Returns the URL of the article. | | media_thumbnail | String | Returns URL of the media thumbnail. | | source | JSON Object | Return details such as ID and name of the source RSS feed.
Contains Default_metadata Key.
Default_Metadata :
Contains
**tlp:** string, values can be AMBER,GREEN,WHITE,RED,NONE .
**score:** confidence score for the soure. Values between 0 to 100. default:100
**tags**: Contains list of tags selected bu user . Contains id,name and some tag related values
**selected:** Boolean indicating wether the default_metadata to be applied to report . If not use default values for the metadata.
**is_apply_all**: Boolean indicating wether to apply metadata to all objects/IOCS created. If not used default values for metadata.
**Default Values: tlp: WHITE, score:100, tags:\[\], selected:true, is_apply_all:tru**e | | date_created | Timestamp | Returns the date of creation of this article in EPOCH format. | | is_read | Boolean | Returns true if the article is read, else returns false. | | bookmarked | Boolean | Returns true of the feed has been bookmarked, else returns false |

| is_reviewed: comment | String | Optional | Pass the review comment. |

#### **Response Parameters**

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |

| url | String | Returns the URL of the article. |
| media_thumbnail | String | Returns the URL of the media thumbnail. |
| source | JSON Object | Return details such as ID, name, and default metadata of the source RSS feed. |
| date_created | Timestamp | Returns the date of creation of the account in EPOCH format. |
| is_read | Boolean | Returns true if the article is read, else returns false. |
| is_reviewed | JSON Object | Returns the review details. |

request.description:
# Retrieve Global Notes

This API endpoint retrieves a list of global notes.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the link to the next page. Returns null in case it is the last page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of notes displayed per page. |
| previous | String | Returns the link to the previous page. Returns null in case it is the first page. |
| results | Array | Returns the information, such as created date and time, user details, note ID, and more. |
| created | Epoch | Returns the date and time when the notes were created. |
| created_by | JSON | Returns the information of the user who created the notes. The information includes the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the notes. |
| meta_data | JSON | Returns any metadata saved with the notes. |
| modified | Epoch | Returns the date and time of the modification of notes. |
| modified_by | JSON | Returns the information of the user who modified the notes. The information includes the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. |
| object_id | String | Returns the UUID of the threat data object associated with the notes. |
| text | String | Returns the description associated with notes. |
| type | String | Returns the type which is saved for note. |

request.description:
### HTTP POST /ingestion/notes

Adds a note to a threat data object.

#### Request Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| object_id | String | Optional | Pass the ID of the threat data object to associate the note. |
| text | String | Required | Pass the description for the note. |
| type | String | Required | Pass the type of the note. |
| meta_data | Dictionary | Optional | Pass the metadata associated with the note. |

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the creation of the note in EPOCH format. |
| created_by | Dictionary | Returns the information of the user who created the notes. The information includes the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. |
| id | String | Returns the unique ID of the note. |
| meta_data | Dictionary | Returns any metadata saved with the notes. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the modification of the note in EPOCH format. |
| modified_by | Dictionary | Returns the information of the user who modified the notes. The information includes the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. |
| object_id | String | Returns the UUID of the threat data object associated with the notes. |
| text | String | Returns the description associated with notes. |
| type | String | Returns the type which is saved for note. |

Updates the details of a note. #### Request Parameters | **Parameters** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | text | String | Optional | Pass the description for the note. | | type | String | Optional | Pass the type of the note. | | meta_data | Dictionary | Optional | Pass the metadata associated with the note. | #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the creation of the note in EPOCH format. | | created_by | Dictionary | Returns the information of the user who created the notes. The information includes
the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. | | id | String | Returns the unique ID of the note. | | meta_data | Dictionary | Returns any metadata saved with the notes. | | modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the modification of the note in EPOCH format. | | modified_by | Dictionary | Returns the information of the user who modified the notes. The information includes
the email address, first name, ID, and last name of the user. | | object_id | String | Returns the UUID of the threat data object associated with the notes. | | text | String | Returns the description associated with notes. | | type | String | Returns the type which is saved for note. |

request.description:
Creates notes in bulk for multiple threat data objects.

### Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| type | String | Mandatory | Pass the object type. Allowed Values: `threatdata`. |
| text | String | Mandatory | Pass the note content to be added to the specified threat data objects. |
| object_ids | Array | Mandatory | Pass the list of object UUIDs to which the note should be attached. To get the `object_id`, use the List Threat Data endpoint |

### Response Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| message | String | Returns the reason based on the status. |
| status | String | Returns the overall result. For example: "SUCCESS", "PARTIAL SUCCESS", or "FAILED". |
| object_ids | Array | Returns the list of threat data object IDs where note creation failed. This is only returned for PARTIAL SUCCESS and BAD REQUEST responses. |
| errors | Array | Contains details of threat data objects that failed to process. This is only returned for PARTIAL SUCCESS and BAD REQUEST responses. |

item.name: Enrichment

request.description:
Retrieve relationship details of threat data objects within CTIX. #### Request Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | ids | Array | Mandatory | Pass a list of threat object IDs. | #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the pagination link to the next page. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the number of results retrieved per page. | | previous | String | Returns the pagination link to the previous page. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | hi | Bool | Returns True if the threat data object is hidden in the threat investigation canvas, else returns false. | | prop | String | Returns additional information about the threat data object or the relationship type. | | t | String | Returns the value of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | type | String | Returns one of the following:
`node`: Indicates the threat data object.
`link`: Indicates the relationship type. | | id1 | String | Returns the ID of the source threat data object. | | id2 | String | Returns the ID of the target threat data object. | | u | String | Returns an endpoint to the image of the threat data object. |

query.description: Pass the page number to retrieve enrichment results. Default: 1
Pass the number results to retrieve per page. Default: 10

request.description:
Enrich threat data objects for threat investigation using third-party enrichment tools configured in CTIX. #### Request Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | identifier | String | Mandatory | Pass `ctix` to indicate that the threat data object already exists in the CTIX database. If you pass anything else it indicates a custom object. | | value | String | Mandatory | Pass the value of the threat data object. | | action_slug | String | Mandatory | Pass the slug value of the action. For example, `get_ip`. | | app_slug | String | Mandatory | Pass the slug of an enrichment tool to use for enrichment.
To retrieve the list of enrichment tools, use the _GET
Enrichment Tools_ API. | | type | String | Mandatory | Pass the type or the sub type of the threat data object such as url, domain, ipv4-addr, and more. | | object_type | String | Mandatory | Pass the type of the threat data object such as indicator, vulnerability, and more. | | object_id | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the threat data object. | | raw_data | String | Mandatory | If the node is already enriched then pass the raw data to prevent from getting re-enriched. | #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the pagination link to the next page. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the number of results per page. | | previous | String | Returns the pagination link to the previous page. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | hi | Boolean | Returns True if the threat data object is hidden in the threat investigations canvas, else returns False. | | prop | String | Returns any additional information about the threat data object or the relationship type. | | t | String | Returns the value of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | type | String | Returns
`node`: Indicates a threat data object.
`link`: Indicates a relationship type. | | id1 | String | Returns the ID of the source node. | | id2 | String | Returns the ID of the target node. | | u | String | Returns an endpoint to the image of the node. |

response.name: if enriched before

item.description: Use the API in this section to get perform enrichment on threat data from the threat investigations module.

item.name: Relationship

query.description: [Required] Pass the source object type.
[Required] Pass the target object type.

request.description:
Retrieve the list of possible STIX 2.1 relationship types that can exist between two STIX Domain Objects.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| relationship | String | Returns the possible STIX relationship types. |

Retrieve the relationship types that exist between two threat data objects. #### Request Body | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | ids | Array | Mandatory | Pass a list of threat data object IDs. | #### Response Data | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the pagination link to the next page. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the number of results per page. | | previous | String | Returns the pagination link to the previous page. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the relation ship type that exists between two threat data objects. | | hi | Boolean | Returns True if the threat data object is hidden from the threat investigations canvas, else returns false. | | prop | String | Returns the details of the relationships. | | t | String | Returns the STIX relationship type. | | type | String | `node`: Indicates a threat data object.
`link`: Indicates a relationship type. | | id1 | String | Returns the ID of the source threat data object. | | id2 | String | Returns the ID of the target threat data object. |

response.name: Edges

item.description: Use the API in this section to gain an understanding of the relationship types between any two STIX 2.1 objects or two threat data objects.

item.name: Publishing

request.description:
Creates a report object from the details retrieved from the threat investigation. #### Request Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | title | String | Mandatory | Pass a title for the intel. | | create_intel_feed | Boolean | Mandatory | Pass True to create the intel. | | items: id | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | items:hi | Boolean | Mandatory | Pass true if the threat data object is hidden in the threat investigations canvas, else pass false. | | items:prop | Object | Mandatory | Pass any additional information about the threat data object or the relationship type. | | items:t | String | Mandatory | Pass the value of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | items:type | String | Mandatory | Pass one of the following values:
`node`:- If the item is a threat data object.
`link`: If the item is a relationship type. | | items:id1 | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the source threat data object or relationship type. | | items:id2 | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the target threat data object or relationship type. | | items:u | String | Mandatory | Pass the endpoint to the image of the node. | #### Response Parameters Status code 200: A background task has been initiated to create the intel.

response.name: create intel

request.description:
Creates intel in the draft state from the details retrieved from threat investigation. #### Request Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | title | String | Mandatory | Pass a title for the intel. | | create_stix | Boolean | Mandatory | Pass True to create intel in draft state. | | items: id | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | items:hi | Boolean | Mandatory | Pass true if the threat data object is hidden in the threat investigations canvas, else pass false. | | items:prop | Object | Mandatory | Pass any additional information about the threat data object or the relationship type. | | items:t | String | Mandatory | Pass the value of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | items:type | String | Mandatory | Pass one of the following values:
`node`:- If the item is a threat data object.
`link`: If the item is a relationship type. | | items:id1 | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the source threat data object or relationship type. | | items:id2 | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the target threat data object or relationship type. | | items:u | String | Mandatory | Pass the endpoint to the image of the node. | #### Response Parameters Status code 200: A background task has been initiated to create the intel.

response.name: create draft

query.description: [Required] Pass "visualizer" to retrieve intel history of threat investigations.

request.description:
Retrieve the intel creation history of threat investigations.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the URL link to the next page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of results per page. |
| previous | String | Returns the URL link to the previous page. |
| component | String | Returns the component as visualizer. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the intel creation date and time. |
| created_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the creator of the intel. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the intel creation history. |
| modified_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the modifier of the intel. |
| published_on | Timestamp | Returns the date and time when the intel was published. |
| status | Status | Returns the status of the intel, such as DRAFT, CREATED, and more. |
| report_id | String | Returns the ID of the created report object. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the report object. |
| tlp | String | Returns any associated TLP with the intel. |

item.description: Use the APIs in this section to publish the intel, create a draft, and view intel publishing history in threat investigations.

item.name: Canvas

query.description: Pass the ID of the creator.
Pass the query text to search threat investigations by the title.
Pass the sharing type to filter. Allowed values: private,shared,received
Pass the created from time in EPOCH format to filter results.
Pass the created to time in EPOCH format to filter results.

request.description:
Retrieve a list of canvases.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the pagination link to the next page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the number of results per page. |
| previous | String | Returns the pagination link to the previous page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of canvases created. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of a canvas. |
| name | String | Returns the name of a canvas. |
| created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time when the canvas is created. |
| modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time when the canvas is last modified. |
| created_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the user who created the canvas. |
| shared_type | String | Returns the sharing type of the canvas, such as shared, private, or received. |

query.description: private,shared,received

variable.description: Pass the unique ID of a canvas

request.description:
Retrieve the details of a canvas.

**Request Parameters**

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the canvas |
| name | String | Returns the name of the canvas. |
| shared_type | String | Returns sharing type of the canvas, such as shared, private, or received. |
| shared_users | Array | Returns the users list with whom the canvas is shared. |
| created_by | JSON Object | Returns the details of the creator of the canvas. |

Pass the number of records to retrieve per page. Default: 10

variable.description: Pass the unique ID of a threat investigation canvas.

request.description:
Returns the node details of a threat investigation canvas. #### Request Parameters This API endpoint does not require any request parameter. #### Response Parameters | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | | next | String | Returns the pagination link to navigate to the next page. | | page_size | Integer | Returns the number of elements present on a page. | | previous | String | Returns the pagination link to navigate to the previous page. | | id | String | Returns the ID of the threat data element. | | hi | Bool | Returns `true` if the threat data element is hidden in the Threat investigation canvas, else returns False. | | prop | String | Returns some additional information about the threat data element on the canvas. | | t | String | Returns the value of the threat data object or the relationship type. | | type | String | Returns one of the following values:
node: Indicates a threat data element.
link: Indicates a relationship type. | | id1 | String | Returns the ID of the source threat data object. | | id2 | String | Returns the ID of the target threat data object. | | u | String | Returns an endpoint to the image of a node. |

item.description: This section contains APIs related to the threat investigation canvas

Threat Investigations in CTIX helps you to investigate security investigations with improved insights on a visual canvas. You can use the interactive graphical visualization canvas to analyze threat data.

item.name: Sandbox

query.description: Pass the page number to retrieve records.
Pass the number of records to retrieve per page.
Pass the ID of a tool to filter records.
Pass the name of the environment to filter records.
Pass the query text to search records.
Pass the ID of a user who submitted the record to filter records.
Pass the submitted from date and time to filter records.
Pass the submitted to date and time to filter records.
Pass the name of the status to filter records.
Pass the name of the sandbox verdict to filter records.

request.description:
Retrieves the list of sandbox records

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the next page of pagination. |
| previous | String | Returns the previous page of pagination. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the count of items on a page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of items on a page. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the record. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the record. |
| tool | Dictionary | Returns the tool details weightage of a record. |
| environment | String | Returns the environment used. |
| submitted_on | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the creation of the record. |
| submitted_by | Dictionary | Returns the details of the user who submitted the file or URL. |
| verdict | String | Returns the verdict according to the used tool. |
| status | String | Returns the status of the sandbox record. |
| instance_id | String | Returns the ID of the tool instance used. |
| report_types | Array | Returns the list of types of reports available for a record. |
| intel_create_status | String | Returns the status of the intel creation through report data for a record. |
| error_message | String | Error message which is generated if report generated is failed. |

request.description:
Retrieves the details of a sandbox record.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the record. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the record. |
| tool | Disctionary | Returns the tool details weightage of a record. |
| environment | String | Returns the environment used. |
| submitted_on | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the creation of the record. |
| submitted_by | Disctionary | Returns the details of the user that submitted the file or URL. |
| verdict | String | Returns the verdict according to the tool used. |
| status | String | Returns the status of the sandbox record. |
| instance_id | String | Returns the ID of the tool instance being used. |
| report_types | Array | Returns the list of types of reports available for a record. |
| intel_create_status | String | Returns the status of the intel creation through report data for a record. |
| full_report_link | String | Contains the link for the actual full report for sandbox tool |
| summarized_report_link | String | Contains the link for executive report for sandbox tool. |
| ioc_report | String | Contains the link for ioc json html report for sandbox tool. |

Creates a sandbox record to analyze a URL.

#### Request Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| type | String | Mandatory | Pass the `url`. |
| value | String | Mandatory | Pass the URL to analyze. |
| is_protected | Boolean | Optional | Pass true and provide the password if the URL is password protected. |
| password | String | Optional | Pass the password of the protected URL. |
| tool | JSON | Mandatory | Pass the details of the tool to be used for analysis. |
| tool:id | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the analysis tool. |
| tool:title | String | Mandatory | Pass the title of the analysis tool. |
| tool:slug | String | Mandatory | Pass the slug of the analysis tool. |
| instance_id | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the tool instance to use for analysis. |
| environment | String | Mandatory | Pass the environment to analyze the URL. |
| systems | String | Mandatory | Pass the analysis system to use. |

Status code 200: Action Submitted Successfully

request.description:
Creates a sandbox record with a file.

#### Request Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| type | String | Mandatory | Pass the type of sandbox record, such as a file. |
| value | Binary | Mandatory | Pass the file submitted in a binary format. |
| is_protected | Bool | Optional | Pass true to password-protect the file, else pass false. |
| password | String | Optional | Pass the password for the file. |
| tool | JSON | Mandatory | Pass the details of the tool used. |
| environment | String | Mandatory | Pass the environment to generate the report. |
| instance_id | UUID | Mandatory | Pass the ID of the instance of the tool. |

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | UUID | Returns the ID of the record. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the record. |
| tool | JSON | Returns the tool details weightage of a record. |
| environment | String | Returns the environment used. |
| submitted_on | Epoch | Returns the date and time of the creation of the record. |
| submitted_by | JSON | Returns the details of the user that submitted the file or URL. |
| verdict | String | Returns the verdict according to the tool used. |
| status | String | Returns the status of the sandbox record. |
| instance_id | UUID | Returns the ID of the tool instance being used. |
| report_types | Array | Returns the list of types of reports available for a record. |
| intel_create_status | String | Returns the status of intel creation using the report data of a record. |

request.description:
Retrieves the list of sandbox apps configured in the CTIX application.

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the URL to the next page of pagination. |
| prev | String | Returns the URL to the previous page of pagination. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of sandbox apps available in the CTIX application. |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the sandbox application. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the sandbox application. |
| slug | String | Returns the slug of the sandbox application. |
| category | String | Returns the category of the sandbox application. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the sandbox application is active, else returns false. |
| configured_once | Boolean | Returns true if the sandbox app has been configured only once, else returns false. |
| third_party_logo | String | Returns the file path of the tool logo. |
| metadata | JSON | Metadata for the environment key . Contains information for how many environment key could be selected. |

request.description:
Retrieves the details of a sandbox app configured in the CTIX application.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| id | String | Returns the ID of the sandbox application. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the sandbox application. |
| slug | String | Returns the slug of the sandbox application. |
| category | String | Returns the category of the sandbox application. |
| is_active | Boolean | Returns true if the sandbox application is active, else returns false. |

| third_party_logo | String | Returns the file path of the tool logo. |

response.name: Sandbox App Details

request.description:
Fetches the list of instances of the sandbox application.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameters.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns the URL to the next page of pagination. |
| previous | String | Returns the URL to the previous page of pagination. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the count of items on a page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of items on a page. |
| app_unique_id | UUID | Returns the unique ID of the sandbox application. |
| app_title | String | Returns the title of the sandbox application. |
| configuration | String | Returns the configuration of the instance. |
| connectivity_detail | String | Returns the details of the connectivity status. |
| connectivity_message | String | Returns the message about the connectivity. |
| connectivity_status | String | Returns the status of the connectivity. |
| connector_version | String | Returns the version of the connector used. |
| created_by | JSON | Returns the details of the user that created the instance. |
| created_date | Epoch | Returns the date and time of the creation of the instance. |
| csol_lite_id | UUID | Returns the ID of the CO lite instance. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the sandbox application instance. |
| expiry_mail_send | Bool | Returns true when the quota expiry mail is sent, else returns false. |
| id | UUID | Returns the ID of the sandbox application instance. |
| iframe_allowed | Bool | Returns true if the iframe report generation is allowed, else returns false. |
| is_active | Bool | Returns true if the instance is active, else returns false. |
| is_default | Bool | Returns true if the instance is a default instance, else returns false. |
| is_removed | Bool | Returns true if the instance is removed, else returns false. |
| lite_model | String | Returns the name of the model of CSOL lite used. |
| modified_by | JSON | Returns the details of the user that last modified the sandbox application. |
| modified_date | Epoch | Returns the date and time of the modification of the instance. |
| on_lite | Bool | Returns true if the application is running on CTIX lite, else returns false. |
| quota | JSON | Returns the details of the quota used or available. |
| slug | Slug | Returns the slug of the instance. |
| status_code | String | Returns the status code of the instance. |
| tested_by | JSON | Returns the details of the user that tested the instance. |
| tested_date | Epoch | Returns the date and time when the test was done. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the sandbox application instance. |
| uploaded_file_data | Array | Returns the list of uploaded file data. |

request.description:
Fetches the details of a sandbox app instance

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any input parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| app_unique_id | UUID | Returns the unique ID of the sandbox application. |
| app_title | String | Returns the title of the sandbox application. |
| configuration | String | Returns the configuration of the instance. |
| connectivity_detail | String | Returns the details of the connectivity status. |
| connectivity_message | String | Returns the message about the connectivity. |
| connectivity_status | String | Returns the status of the connectivity. |
| connector_version | String | Returns the version of the connector used. |
| created_by | JSON | Returns the details of the user that created the instance. |
| created_date | Epoch | Returns the date and time of the creation of the instance. |
| csol_lite_id | UUID | Returns the ID of the CSOL lite instance. |
| description | String | Returns the description of the sandbox application instance. |
| expiry_mail_send | Bool | Returns true when the expiry mail is sent, else returns false. |
| id | UUID | Returns the ID of the sandbox application instance. |
| iframe_allowed | Bool | Returns true if iframe report generation is allowed, else returns false. |
| is_active | Bool | Returns true if the instance is active, else returns false. |
| is_default | Bool | Returns true if the instance is a default instance, else returns false. |
| is_removed | Bool | Returns true if the instance has been removed, else returns false. |
| lite_model | String | Returns the name of the lite model. |
| modifed_by | JSON | Returns the details of the user that last modified the instance. |
| modified_date | Epoch | Returns the date and time of the modification of the instance. |
| on_lite | Bool | Returns true if the application is running on CTIX lite, else returns false. |
| quota | JSON | Returns the details of the quota used or available. |
| slug | Slug | Returns the slug of the instance. |
| status_code | String | Returns the status code of the instance. |
| tested_by | JSON | Returns the details of the user that tested the instance. |
| tested_date | Epoch | Returns the date and time of the test performed. |
| title | String | Returns the title of the sandbox application instance. |
| uploaded_file_data | Array | Returns the list of uploaded file data. |

item.description: CTIX offers Sandbox capability that helps analysts to perform deep analysis of evasive and unknown threats. Sandbox is a testing environment where analysts can execute potentially malicious files or URL requests in an isolated area away from an organization's network. Files are executed and tested without any threat to computers or networks.

request.description:
Returns the list of threat defender content files available in CTIX.

#### Request Parameters

This API endpoint does not require any request parameter.

#### Response Parameters

| **Parameter** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| next | String | Returns a URL link to the next page. |
| previous | String | Returns a URL link to the previous page. |
| page_size | Integer | Returns the maximum number of items that can be present on a page. |
| total | Integer | Returns the total number of records. |
| results | List of Objects | Returns the list of threat defender content objects. |
| results: id | Integer | Returns the ID of the threat defender content. |
| results: created_by | String | Returns the details of the user that created the threat defender content. |
| results: created | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of the creation of the threat defender content. |
| results: modified | Timestamp | Returns the date and time of modification of the threat defender content. |
| results: name | String | Returns the name of the threat defender content. |
| results: tags | List | Returns the list of tag objects applied to the rule. Each tag object includes the tag ID, color code, and name of the tag. |
| results: type | String | Returns the type of threat defender content, such as yara. |

Creates a threat defender content record. #### **Request Parameters** | **Parameter** | **Type** | **Required** | **Description** | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | rule | String | Mandatory | Pass the rule content. | | tags | List | Optional | Pass the list of tags of objects to apply to the content. | | tags: id | String | Mandatory | Pass the ID of a tag. | | tags: name | String | Mandatory | Pass the name of a tag. | | tags: colour_code | String | Mandatory | Pass the color code of a tag in HEX key format.
Allowed values:
`#5236E2 #0068FA #EB9C00 #FF5330 #27865F #C4C81D #00A2C2 #C341E7 #AD6B76 #95A1B1` | | external_variables | List | Optional | Pass the list of external variables in key-value pairs to apply when the file is checked against the created threat defender content, such as string, boolean, and number. | | type | String | Optional | Pass the type of threat defender content.
Allowed values:
`yara` | #### Response Parameters Status Code 201: Successful

Tags consist of tag ID, color code, name of the tag, and more. | | type | String | Returns the type of threat defender content, such as YARA. | | external_variables | List | Returns the list of external variables configured for the threat defender content. | | rule | String | Returns the content string. |

request.description:

item.description: The CTIX ATT&CK Navigator enables you to clone and manage multiple layers based on the **MITRE** or **Custom Base Layer**. The layers constitute tactics and techniques used to track and monitor specific adversaries and platforms. You can browse, select, and add the set of techniques and custom techniques to match the particular criteria for specific projects.
